english: age (of a person, animal or plant, etc.)

etymology.interpretation: The combination of 年(年) (nián, "year") and 齡(齡) (líng, "age") refers to the length of time measured in years that a living being or entity has existed. It highlights the concept of age as being a function of the passage of time, measured in years.

examples.chinese: 她的年龄(她的年齡)是二十五岁(是二十五歲)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de niánlíng shì èrshíwǔ suì.
examples.english: Her age is twenty-five years old.

examples.chinese: 这棵树的年龄已经超过一百年(這棵樹的年齡已經超過一百年)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè kē shù de niánlíng yǐjīng chāoguò yībǎi nián.
examples.english: The age of this tree is already over one hundred years.

examples.chinese: 随着年龄的增长(隨著年齡的增長)，他的见识也更加广泛(他的見識也更加廣泛)。
examples.pinyin: Suízhe niánlíng de zēngzhǎng, tā de jiànshì yě gèng jiā guǎngfàn.
examples.english: As his age increases, his knowledge also becomes more extensive.
